title: GB to MB Converter
shortDescription: Convert gigabytes to megabytes instantly with the binary 1024-based storage ratio.
overview: Convert gigabytes to megabytes instantly. This converter uses the binary storage ratio of 1 GB = 1024 MB, which is common in file size calculations and operating system storage views.
howItWorks: Enter the number of gigabytes into the form.
The conversion runs instantly in the browser using the 1024-based storage ratio.
Review the result and continue with related tools if you need another step.

examples.title: Common use case
examples.description: A practical example for binary storage conversions.

examples.title: Another quick example
examples.description: Useful for storage planning, backups and file size checks.

faq.question: Which ratio does this converter use?
faq.answer: This tool uses the binary storage ratio, so 1 GB equals 1024 MB.

faq.question: Can I use this tool on mobile?
faq.answer: Yes. The page works on desktop and mobile screens with a simple input and result layout.

seo.title: GB to MB Converter
seo.description: Free online GB to MB converter using the 1024-based binary storage ratio with instant results.
